revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Campaignbox Campaigns of the Shimazu]] <nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>

revision.comment: Bot: sync with enwiki
revision.text: {{Campaignbox | name = Template:Campaignbox Campaigns of the Shimazu | title = Campaigns of the [[Shimazu clan]] | listclass = hlist | battles = * [[Battle of Ichirai|Ichirai]] * [[Battle of Momotsugi|Momotsugi]] * [[Siege of Kōriyama (1544)|Kōriyama]] * [[Siege of Kajiki|Kajiki]] * [[Siege of Iwatsurugi|Iwatsurugi]] * [[Siege of Oguchi|Oguchi]] * [[Battle of Kizaki|Kizaki]] * [[Siege of Takabaru|Takabaru]] * [[Battle of Mimigawa|Mimigawa]] * [[Siege of Minamata Castle|Minamata]] * [[Battle of Okitanawate|Okitanawate]] * [[Siege of Iwaya Castle|Iwaya]] * [[Kyūshū Campaign|Kyūshū]] * [[Siege of Odawara (1590)|Odawara]] * [[Imjin War|Korea]] * [[Battle of Sekigahara|Sekigahara]] * [[Invasion of Ryukyu|Ryūkyū]] * [[Bombardment of Kagoshima|Kagoshima]] }}<noinclude> [[Category:Japan campaignbox templates|Shimazu]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Campaignbox | name = Template:Campaignbox Campaigns of the Shimazu | title = Campaigns of the [[:en:Shimazu clan|Shimazu clan]] | listclass = hlist | battles = * [[:en:Battle of Ichirai|Ichirai]] * [[:en:Battle of Momotsugi|Momotsugi]] * [[Siege of Kōriyama (1544)|Kōriyama]] * [[Siege of Kajiki|Kajiki]] * [[Siege of Iwatsurugi|Iwatsurugi]] * [[Siege of Oguchi|Oguchi]] * [[:en:Battle of Kizaki|Kizaki]] * [[:en:Siege of Takabaru|Takabaru]] * [[:en:Battle of Mimigawa|Mimigawa]] * [[Siege of Minamata Castle|Minamata]] * [[:en:Battle of Okitanawate|Okitanawate]] * [[:en:Siege of Iwaya Castle|Iwaya]] * [[:en:Kyūshū Campaign|Kyūshū]] * [[:en:Siege of Odawara (1590)|Odawara]] * [[:en:Imjin War|Korea]] * [[:en:Battle of Sekigahara|Sekigahara]] * [[Invasion of Ryukyu|Ryūkyū]] * [[:en:Bombardment of Kagoshima|Kagoshima]] }}<noinclude>
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text: {{Campaignbox | name = Template:Campaignbox Campaigns of the Shimazu | title = Campaigns of the [[:en:Shimazu clan|Shimazu clan]] | listclass = hlist | battles = * [[:en:Battle of Ichirai|Ichirai]] * [[:en:Battle of Momotsugi|Momotsugi]] * [[Siege of Kōriyama (1544)|Kōriyama]] * [[Siege of Kajiki|Kajiki]] * [[Siege of Iwatsurugi|Iwatsurugi]] * [[Siege of Oguchi|Oguchi]] * [[:en:Battle of Kizaki|Kizaki]] * [[:en:Siege of Takabaru|Takabaru]] * [[:en:Battle of Mimigawa|Mimigawa]] * [[Siege of Minamata Castle|Minamata]] * [[:en:Battle of Okitanawate|Okitanawate]] * [[:en:Siege of Iwaya Castle|Iwaya]] * [[:en:Kyūshū Campaign|Kyūshū]] * [[:en:Siege of Odawara (1590)|Odawara]] * [[:en:Imjin War|Korea]] * [[:en:Battle of Sekigahara|Sekigahara]] * [[Invasion of Ryukyu|Ryūkyū]] * [[:en:Bombardment of Kagoshima|Kagoshima]] }}<noinclude> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{Campaignbox | name = Template:Campaignbox Campaigns of the Shimazu | title = Campaigns of the [[:en:Shimazu clan|Shimazu clan]] | listclass = hlist | battles = * [[:en:Battle of Ichirai|Ichirai]] * [[:en:Battle of Momotsugi|Momotsugi]] * [[Siege of Kōriyama (1544)|Kōriyama]] * [[Siege of Kajiki|Kajiki]] * [[Siege of Iwatsurugi|Iwatsurugi]] * [[Siege of Oguchi|Oguchi]] * [[:en:Battle of Kizaki|Kizaki]] * [[:en:Siege of Takabaru|Takabaru]] * [[:en:Battle of Mimigawa|Mimigawa]] * [[Siege of Minamata Castle|Minamata]] * [[:en:Battle of Okitanawate|Okitanawate]] * [[:en:Siege of Iwaya Castle|Iwaya]] * [[:en:Kyūshū Campaign|Kyūshū]] * [[:en:Siege of Odawara (1590)|Odawara]] * [[:en:Imjin War|Korea]] * [[:en:Battle of Sekigahara|Sekigahara]] * [[Invasion of Ryukyu|Ryūkyū]] * [[:en:Bombardment of Kagoshima|Kagoshima]] }}<noinclude> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23128882600|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Campaignbox | name = Template:Campaignbox Campaigns of the Shimazu | title = Campaigns of the [[:en:Shimazu clan|Shimazu clan]] | listclass = hlist | battles = * [[:en:Battle of Ichirai|Ichirai]] * [[:en:Battle of Momotsugi|Momotsugi]] * [[Siege of Kōriyama (1544)|Kōriyama]] * [[Siege of Kajiki|Kajiki]] * [[Siege of Iwatsurugi|Iwatsurugi]] * [[Siege of Oguchi|Oguchi]] * [[:en:Battle of Kizaki|Kizaki]] * [[:en:Siege of Takabaru|Takabaru]] * [[:en:Battle of Mimigawa|Mimigawa]] * [[Siege of Minamata Castle|Minamata]] * [[:en:Battle of Okitanawate|Okitanawate]] * [[:en:Siege of Iwaya Castle|Iwaya]] * [[:en:Kyūshū Campaign|Kyūshū]] * [[:en:Siege of Odawara (1590)|Odawara]] * [[:en:Imjin War|Korea]] * [[:en:Battle of Sekigahara|Sekigahara]] * [[Invasion of Ryukyu|Ryūkyū]] * [[:en:Bombardment of Kagoshima|Kagoshima]] }}<noinclude> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{Campaignbox | name = Template:Campaignbox Campaigns of the Shimazu | title = Campaigns of the [[:en:Shimazu clan|Shimazu clan]] | listclass = hlist | battles = * [[:en:Battle of Ichirai|Ichirai]] * [[:en:Battle of Momotsugi|Momotsugi]] * [[Siege of Kōriyama (1544)|Kōriyama]] * [[Siege of Kajiki|Kajiki]] * [[Siege of Iwatsurugi|Iwatsurugi]] * [[Siege of Oguchi|Oguchi]] * [[:en:Battle of Kizaki|Kizaki]] * [[:en:Siege of Takabaru|Takabaru]] * [[:en:Battle of Mimigawa|Mimigawa]] * [[Siege of Minamata Castle|Minamata]] * [[:en:Battle of Okitanawate|Okitanawate]] * [[:en:Siege of Iwaya Castle|Iwaya]] * [[:en:Kyūshū Campaign|Kyūshū]] * [[:en:Siege of Odawara (1590)|Odawara]] * [[:en:Imjin War|Korea]] * [[:en:Battle of Sekigahara|Sekigahara]] * [[Invasion of Ryukyu|Ryūkyū]] * [[:en:Bombardment of Kagoshima|Kagoshima]] }}<noinclude> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Campaignbox_Campaigns_of_the_Shimazu here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Campaignbox_Campaigns_of_the_Shimazu for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Campaignbox | name = Template:Campaignbox Campaigns of the Shimazu | title = Campaigns of the [[:en:Shimazu clan|Shimazu clan]] | listclass = hlist | battles = * [[:en:Battle of Ichirai|Ichirai]] * [[:en:Battle of Momotsugi|Momotsugi]] * [[Siege of Kōriyama (1544)|Kōriyama]] * [[Siege of Kajiki|Kajiki]] * [[Siege of Iwatsurugi|Iwatsurugi]] * [[Siege of Oguchi|Oguchi]] * [[:en:Battle of Kizaki|Kizaki]] * [[:en:Siege of Takabaru|Takabaru]] * [[:en:Battle of Mimigawa|Mimigawa]] * [[Siege of Minamata Castle|Minamata]] * [[:en:Battle of Okitanawate|Okitanawate]] * [[:en:Siege of Iwaya Castle|Iwaya]] * [[:en:Kyūshū Campaign|Kyūshū]] * [[:en:Siege of Odawara (1590)|Odawara]] * [[:en:Imjin War|Korea]] * [[:en:Battle of Sekigahara|Sekigahara]] * [[Invasion of Ryukyu|Ryūkyū]] * [[:en:Bombardment of Kagoshima|Kagoshima]] }}<noinclude> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
